mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM book WHERE status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM book WHERE status = 1 AND available_stock > 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_order WHERE DATE(apply_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_order WHERE lend_time IS NOT NULL AND DATE(lend_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_order WHERE return_time IS NOT NULL AND DATE(return_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_order WHERE status = 'OVERDUE'
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT seat_id) FROM reservation WHERE status = 'IN_USE'
SELECT id AS bookId, title, borrow_count AS borrowCount FROM book WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY borrow_count DESC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT sr.id AS studyRoomId, sr.name AS studyRoomName, sr.capacity AS capacity, COALESCE(occ.cnt, 0) AS occupiedSeats, CASE WHEN sr.capacity IS NULL OR sr.capacity = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(COALESCE(occ.cnt, 0) * 100.0 / sr.capacity, 2) END AS utilizationRate FROM study_room sr LEFT JOIN ( SELECT s.study_room_id AS rid, COUNT(DISTINCT r.seat_id) AS cnt FROM reservation r INNER JOIN seat s ON r.seat_id = s.id WHERE r.status IN ('PENDING_CHECK_IN', 'IN_USE') AND r.end_time > NOW() GROUP BY s.study_room_id ) occ ON occ.rid = sr.id WHERE sr.status = 1 ORDER BY utilizationRate DESC, occupiedSeats DESC LIMIT #{limit}
